query:
-- FK: agent_tasks.agentId → agent_deployments.id
ALTER TABLE agent_tasks 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_at_agent 
FOREIGN KEY (agentId) REFERENCES agent_deployments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: agent_audit_log.agentId → agent_deployments.id
ALTER TABLE agent_audit_log 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_aal_agent 
FOREIGN KEY (agentId) REFERENCES agent_deployments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: evidence_chain_of_custody.evidenceId → evidence_items.evidenceId
ALTER TABLE evidence_chain_of_custody 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_ecoc_evidence 
FOREIGN KEY (evidenceId) REFERENCES evidence_items(evidenceId) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: agent_deployments.c2ServerId → c2_servers.id
ALTER TABLE agent_deployments 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_ad_c2server 
FOREIGN KEY (c2ServerId) REFERENCES c2_servers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
